overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a group of people gathered around a bonfire on a rooftop at night, with a futuristic neon-lit cityscape featuring distinctive corporate towers visible in the background. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with warm firelight contrasting against the cool blue night sky.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a rooftop bonfire gathering at night in a futuristic city. Multiple NPCs are seated and standing around the central bonfire, with two distinctive corporate towers illuminated against the dark sky in the background. The scene features warm firelight contrasting with cool blue ambient lighting from the city, with scattered chairs and debris around the concrete rooftop surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a rooftop gathering that emphasizes the contrast between intimate warmth and a cold, futuristic urban expanse. It begins with a focus on a central bonfire where several people are seated and standing, their figures illuminated by the flickering orange glow. As the eye moves outward, the warm firelight gives way to the cool blue ambient lighting of the concrete rooftop, scattered with chairs and debris. The scene then expands to reveal the dark night sky, dominated by two towering, illuminated corporate structures that loom over the gathering.
